mapper.select:
SELECT /* com.ktmmobile.mcp.etc.mapper.GiftMapper.getPrmtBasList */ DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID , PRMT_TEXT AS PRMT_NM , PRMT_TYPE , NVL(CHOICE_LIMIT,0) AS LIMIT_CNT FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF@DL_MSP B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG@DL_MSP C , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC@DL_MSP D , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP E , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL@DL_MSP F WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = F.PRMT_ID AND C.ORGN_ID = E.ORGN_ID AND A.SHOW_YN = 'Y' -- 직영/제휴 프로모션 정산을 위한 보완 AND E.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(A.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',E.TYPE_DTL_CD2,A.ORGN_TYPE) -- 채널유형 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.STRT_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AND (TO_DATE(A.END_DT,'YYYYMMDD')+1) AND B.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType} AND D.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND E.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND F.MODEL_ID = (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = #{modelId})
AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y'
AND 1 = 2
AND A.NAC_YN = 'Y'
AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y'
AND 1 = 2
ORDER BY PRMT_TYPE DESC

SELECT PRMT.PRMT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_NM , PRDT.PRDT_DESC , PRDT.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , PRDT.IMG_FILE , PRDT.WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRMT INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRDT ON PRMT.PRDT_ID = PRDT.PRDT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND PRDT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND PRMT.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY SORT

SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF@DL_MSP B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG@DL_MSP C , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC@DL_MSP D , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP E , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL@DL_MSP F WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = F.PRMT_ID AND A.SHOW_YN = 'Y' -- 직영/제휴 프로모션 정산을 위한 보완 AND E.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(A.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',E.TYPE_DTL_CD2,A.ORGN_TYPE) -- 채널유형 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.STRT_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AND (TO_DATE(A.END_DT,'YYYYMMDD')+8) AND B.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType} AND D.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND E.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND F.MODEL_ID = (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = #{modelId})
AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y'
AND 1 = 2
AND A.NAC_YN = 'Y'
AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y'
AND 1 = 2

SELECT PRMT.PRMT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_NM , PRDT.PRDT_DESC , PRDT.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , PRDT.IMG_FILE , PRDT.WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRMT INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRDT ON PRMT.PRDT_ID = PRDT.PRDT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND PRDT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND PRMT.PRMT_ID IN
#{prmtIdArr}

SELECT PRMT_ID , PRMT_NM , NAC_YN , MNP_YN , REQ_BUY_TYPE , NVL(AMOUNT_LIMIT,0) AS AMOUNT_LIMIT , PRMT_TEXT FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND SHOW_YN = 'Y' -- 직영/제휴 프로모션 정산을 위한 보완 AND PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}

SELECT PRMT.PRMT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_ID , PRDT.PRDT_NM , PRDT.PRDT_DESC , PRDT.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , PRDT.IMG_FILE , PRDT.WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRMT INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRDT ON PRMT.PRDT_ID = PRDT.PRDT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND PRMT.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} AND PRDT.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD')-TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS NOW_TO_ACTV_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{phone} AND SUB_LINK_NAME = #{name} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS = 'A'
SELECT PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT@DL_MSP ( PRMT_ID ,CONTRACT_NUM ,PRDT_ID ,QUANTITY ,REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{prmtId} , #{contractNum} , #{prdtId} , '1' , SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 AS inResult FROM DUAL@DL_MSP
mapper.select: SELECT '- '||GIFT.PRDT_NM AS PRDT_NM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT@DL_MSP RESULT INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP GIFT ON RESULT.PRDT_ID = GIFT.PRDT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND RESULT.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT_HIST@DL_MSP ( GRP_NUM ,PRMT_ID ,CONTRACT_NUM ,PRDT_ID ,QUANTITY ,RVISN_RSN ,EVNT_CD ,REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( 1 , #{prmtId} , #{contractNum} , #{prdtId} , '1' , 'PORTAL' , 'I' , SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 AS inResult FROM DUAL@DL_MSP
mapper.select:
SELECT TAX_NO , REQUEST_TIME , ADDRESS_YN FROM MSP_TAX_SMS_LIST@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1
AND TAX_NO = #{taxNo}

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD')-TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS NOW_TO_ACTV_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{telNO} AND SUB_LINK_NAME = #{userNm} AND SUB_STATUS = 'A'
